description_long: This is a classic, industrial-style fire hydrant with a cylindrical body and a domed top, finished in a weathered, yellowish-brown color. The hydrant features three prominent hose connection outlets, each capped and secured with large bolts, and two of the caps are attached with metal chains. The base is wide and flanged, designed for secure mounting to the ground, and the surface shows signs of wear and rust, indicating long-term outdoor exposure. The top of the hydrant has a large operating nut or cap, which is used to open the water valve. Subtle manufacturer or model markings are visible on the front lower section of the body. The overall construction is robust, with all visible parts made of heavy-duty metal, suitable for urban emergency use.
description: A weathered, yellow-brown metal fire hydrant with three capped outlets, chained caps, and a flanged base, showing signs of outdoor wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main outlet, large operating nut, and visible bolts on the face.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical body, one chained cap, and the domed top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back outlet, chained cap, and the hydrant's robust, flanged base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the secondary outlet, bolts, and subtle manufacturer markings.
